name: Oob
description: Oob is a child that was introduced in the World Tournament after Goku defeats Majin Boo. When Boo is killed, Goku wishes that he gets reincarnated as a good person so that he could battle with him once again. Oob is the result of this wish, hence his name. Goku decides to train Oob at the end of Z and GT begins with the completion of Oob's training. Oob grew up a young warrior/farmer boy. Oob got his particular powers because he was created from Boo. Oob later fuses with the original Majin Boo.

name: Orhun Dura
description: He is an explorer who defeats the magical beasts that lurk in the labyrinth, and was a member of the "Hero Party" that reached the unprecedented 94th floor of the labyrinth, where no one has yet reached the lowest 100th floor. For the sake of his companions, he converted from a "Swordsman" to an "Enchanter" and developed his own unique form of magic.He supported them in many ways, but one day he was suddenly ridiculed as a "Jack of all trades, master of none" and expelled from the party. name: Pinoko
description: Pinoko is Black Jack's sidekick, ~!a little girl constructed by him who is actually a Teratogenous Cystoma, a sort of tumor also known as a teratoma. As seen in Teratogenous Cystoma, she was a rare type of Siamese twin, living in one of Black Jack's patients' bodies for eighteen years until Black Jack extracted her and gave her a real body, a plastic exo-skeleton. After being rejected by her twin sister, she started to live with him in his house. She always helps the doctor by doing house-chores

name: Quin
description: Quin works in the information processing section, and is now in charge of sending the “memories of the dead” to arbiters. She used to work as an arbiter and was the owner of Quindecim prior to Decim's appointment there.

nativeName: レンレンレンナグサランレンシーア・ルルンンレン・ナコラ
description: Takeya's devoted DearS, who was found by Takeya after her suspension pod was lost and broke open during transport. Initially, she had no given name, but Takeya dubbed her "Ren" after the first word of her identification number—at which time she "imprinted" upon him. According to DearS law, a slave that chooses a master on her own is seen as having the 'Gift' and is considered sacred. name: Rin Obami
description: Rin is a member of The Hundred Devouring Families. He arrived to the Hyakkaou Private Academy to gamble against Kirari Momobami in order to dethrone her from student council president position and thus choosing a new leader of their clan. His branch is widely known for being good swindlers.

description: A second year student who uses her cute appearance as a weapon in her career as a beauty YTuber and model. She is popular and well known, even declaring herself the idol of the school, but has no friends.

name: Ryuuji Nomoto
description: Nomoto Ryuji, nickname Baremoto, which means "Uncovered" has been detained for con, usurpation, and theft. He frequently committed crimes in shopping centers. Nomoto is one of the seven protagonists of RAINBOW. He wears glasses and have a character of being an observer. Sakuragi used his glasses to refract sunbeam to light the cigarette which Joe gave to him.

Sachiko is slated to marry her cousin and fiancé Suguru after she graduates. This has caused her some distress since, because although she initially cared deeply for him, he did not reciprocate.
